dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noBusinesses: No businesses yet. Go to <0>{{members}}</0> to add your first {{member}} — a business is created automatically.

employees.noBusinessNotice: You don't own a business yet. Adding your first {{member}} will automatically create one (<1>"<your name>'s Team"</1>). You can also create one explicitly with "New business".
employees.autoCreatedNote: No business existed, so a default one was created automatically and your {{member}} was added to it.

newEmployeeModal.noBusinessSelected: No business selected — a default one will be created automatically for this {{member}}.
newEmployeeModal.shareCredentials: Share these credentials with the {{member}}; they sign in from the desktop app's login picker.
newEmployeeModal.errorTaken: That email or username is already taken.

detail.noBusinessContext: Open this page from the Dashboard or Employees list so the business context is known.
detail.errorRange: Could not load reports for this range.
detail.errorStartAfterEnd: The start date is after the end date.
